title: VCP Invocation Envelope
description: Gateway -> Provider, one capability invocation. The Provider MUST verify the grant, recompute argument_hash and confirm it matches the grant, honor dry_run, respect grant scope, and use idempotency_key for retry-safe effects. See SPECIFICATION.md §8.

grant.description: The grant authorizing exactly this invocation. Its audience MUST equal `capability`.

argument_hash.description: sha256(JCS(arguments)). MUST match grant.argument_hash; else reject ARGUMENT_HASH_MISMATCH.

snapshot_refs.description: References to input snapshots for snapshot-read / external-read reproducibility (§10).

dry_run.description: When true (and the manifest declares supports_dry_run), the Provider returns the would-be effect without committing (§9).

trace.description: W3C Trace Context (§25) for cross-actor correlation in an OpenTelemetry backend.
